title: progress — data retention windows
description: Progress records are development-material for athletes — long retention. GradingResult retained indefinitely for belt provenance across career moves. Extended retention Enterprise-only.

policies.description: 7 years post-enrollment-archival. Enterprise via progress.extended_retention entitlement: 10 years.
7 years post-enrollment-archival. Anonymized on purge (coach_user_id set to null, body cleared) so revision chain integrity preserved.
Reference data — retained indefinitely while referenced. Platform defaults never purged.
INDEFINITE retention — belt progression is the athlete's career-long provenance. Never hard-purged; archived to cold storage on tenant erasure.
